title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates building a $481k annual revenue product in 45 days using Claude Code with zero coding experience on the team. The video outlines five steps for rapid product development: starting with problem definition, knowing where to engineer vs reuse, learning vocabulary rather than syntax, iterating thoughtfully, and proactively identifying failure modes.
